message:
Fix spawn timeout bug and add missing export

- Fix critical bug in spawn.ts where timeout handler wasn't actually
  killing the process - now properly calls proc.kill() on timeout
- Add missing spawnJfp export to testing/index.ts
- Add try-catch around JSON.parse in E2E tests for robustness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
